stat_block.text: This potent weapon used by Treerazer is a *+4 greater corrosive major striking obsidian greataxe* that grants a +4 item bonus to attack rolls, deals an extra 2d6 damage to plants, and has the properties of adamantine.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Artifact
traits.text: Items with this trait are artifacts. These magic items can't be crafted by normal means, and they can't be damaged by normal means. Artifacts are always rare or unique.

traits.name: Cursed
traits.text: An item with this trait is cursed to cause trouble for its owner. A curse isn’t detected when the item is identified, though a critical success reveals both the presence and exact nature of the curse. Cursed items can’t be discarded once they’ve been triggered or invested the first time. The item can be removed only if the curse is removed.

traits.name: Evocation
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the evocation school of magic, typically involving energy and elemental forces.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text: This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: You sense the world around *Blackaxe* as though you were in its location and can use any of your innate spells through the link as if it were the source of the spell. If another creature is wielding *Blackaxe*, it must succeed at a DC 50 Will save or be slowed 2 until it relinquishes the weapon.
abilities.requirement: You aren't wielding *Blackaxe* and you are its true owner.

traits.name: Divination
traits.text: The divination school of magic typically involves obtaining or transferring information, or predicting events.

traits.name: Scrying
traits.text: A scrying effect lets you see, hear, or otherwise get sensory information from a distance using a sensor or apparatus, rather than your own eyes and ears.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: *Blackaxe* appears in your hands, teleporting instantly from its prior location.
abilities.requirement: You aren't wielding *Blackaxe* and you are its true owner.

traits.name: Conjuration
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the conjuration school of magic, typically involving summoning, creation, teleportation, or moving things from place to place.

traits.name: Teleportation
traits.text: Teleportation effects allow you to instantaneously move from one point in space to another. Teleportation does not usually trigger reactions based on movement.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: Make a Strike against a living tree with *Blackaxe*. If it hits, the tree withers to ash and you heal 250 Hit Points and gain the benefit of *restoration* (6th) and *restore senses*.

traits.name: Death
traits.text: An effect with the death trait kills you immediately if it reduces you to 0 HP. Some death effects can bring you closer to death or slay you outright without reducing you to 0 HP.

traits.name: Healing
traits.text: A healing effect restores a creature's body, typically by restoring Hit Points, but sometimes by removing diseases or other debilitating effects.

traits.name: Necromancy
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the necromancy school of magic, typically involving forces of life and death.
